name: vactrak
description: VacTrak monorepo — Nest API + Nuxt SSR web

scripts.build: npm run build -w @vactrak/shared && npm run build -w @vactrak/api && npm run build -w @vactrak/web
scripts.build:api: npm run build -w @vactrak/shared && npm run build -w @vactrak/api
scripts.build:web: npm run build -w @vactrak/shared && npm run build -w @vactrak/web
scripts.db: docker compose up -d && docker compose logs -f
